title: Cacalia lithospermoides
taxonomy: Cacalia lithospermoides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Cacalia, which is a part of the tribe Eupatorieae. Cacalia lithospermoides is native to East Asia, specifically in China and Japan. The plant is also known as the 'lithospermoid Cacalia'. Further classification details are available in botanical resources.
